description_long: This guard rail consists of five evenly spaced horizontal metal bars supported by two vertical posts on either side. The structure is constructed from round tubular steel, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The ends of the horizontal rails protrude slightly beyond the vertical posts, and there are no visible end treatments or safety caps. The surface is finished in a glossy black coating, likely for corrosion resistance and visual uniformity. The rail is designed to be mounted using embedded posts, as indicated by the extensions at the ends of the vertical supports. There are no reflective markings or additional safety features visible on the rail.
description: A black, tubular steel guard rail with five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, finished in glossy black. The design is simple, robust, and lacks reflective markings or end treatments.
description_view_0: Front view showing five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, with all structural elements clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the vertical post visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the five horizontal bars and two vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile with only the vertical post edge visible.
